titleStmt.title: SII 8.244: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 244. (A.R. No. 639-A of 1902). ON THE SAME WALLS.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
@ svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 2.vatu Irupattiraṇṭāvatu siṁhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu trayodaśiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu Āṟkāṭṭuk kūṟṟattuc ciṟṟāṟkāṭṭu kiḻāṉ Araiyaṉ maṉṟuḷāṭumperumāḷ kulacekara vāṇātarāyaṉeṉ kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭuk kīḻkūṟṟu Amparnāṭṭuk koṟṟavācalil tillaināyakaṉ toṇṭaimāṉ Uṭaiyāṉ puvaṉekavira vakaḷaṅkanāṭāḻvāṟku vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭut
ta paricāvatu . Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭuk kiḻkkūṟṟu Amparnāṭṭu Eṇṇukuṭi yil Eṉ kāṇiyāy viṟṟa nattattil Aṇṭakkuṭaiyāṉ maṉaiirup peṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa maṉaikku melpāṟkellai neṭuvāyaluṭaiyār maṉaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Eṉpakkal koḷkiṉṟār koṇṭa maṇṇiṭṭukkum viḷainilattukkum teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai nāyiṉār tirumikaiccūruṭaiyār tevatāṉa maṉaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai teruvukku vaṭakkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟai vuṭpaṭa maṉai 100 Ikkuḻi nūṟum Uyyakkoṇṭār ma
ṉaiyirup peṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa maṉaikku melpāṟkellai neṭuvāyaluṭaiyār maṉaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai meṟpaṭiyār maṇṇiṭṭukkum viḷainilattukkum teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai nāyiṉār tirumikaiccūruṭaiyār tevatāṉa maṇṇiṭṭukkum viḷainilattukkum meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai teruvukku vaṭakkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟaivuṭpaṭa maṉai 100 Ikkuḻi nūṟum teṟkiṟciṟakil tirumañcaṉamaḻakiyāṉ maṉaiyirup peṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa maṉaikkumelpāṟkellai Uṭaiyār tirumicaiccūruṭaiyār
tevatāṉamaṉaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai teruvukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai viṭaṅkāṇṭār maṉaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Uṭaiyār tirumikaiccūruṭaiyār tirunāmattukkāṇi viḷainilattukku vaṭakkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟai vuṭpaṭa maṉai kuḻi 100 5 10.l meṟkaṭaiyat tirumulasthāṉamuṭaiyār tevatāṉa maṉai 10 2 nikki 100 3 10 8 Ikkuḻi nūṟṟu muppatteṭṭum Amparnāṭṭukkoṉār maṉai yeṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa maṉaikku
melpāṟkellai koḷkiṉṟār Eṉpakkalk koṇṭa viḷainilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai teruvukkutteṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai neṭuvāyaluṭaiyār maṉaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai koḷkiṉṟār Eṉpakkal vilaikoṇṭa viḷainilattukku vaṭakkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟai vuṭpaṭa maṉai 3 10 Ikkuḻi muppatum kāliṅkarāyarmaṉai yeṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa maṉaikku melpāṟkellai mutaliyār tirunāmattukkāṇi maṉaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai teruvukkut teṟkum kiḻ
pāṟkellai koḷkiṉṟār Eṉpakkal vilaikoṇṭa viḷainilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Innilattukku vaṭakkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟai vuṭpaṭa maṉai 3 10 Ikkuḻi muppatum kuṉṟapperumāḷ maṉaiyirup peṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa maṉaikku melpāṟkellai koḷkiṉṟār Eṉpakkal vilaikoṇṭa viḷainilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai teruvukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai nāyiṉār tirumeyññāṉamuṭaiyār tevatāṉa maṉaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai koḷkiṉṟār Eṉpakkal vilaikoṇṭa viḷainilattukku vaṭakkum Innāṉkellairiḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟai vuṭpaṭa maṉai 2 10 Ik
kuḻi Irupatum pāmpurnāṭṭukkoṉmaṉaiyirup peṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa maṉaikku melpāṟkellai mutaliyār tirunāmattukkāṇi maṉaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Innāyiṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi viḷainilattukkum koḷkiṉṟār Eṉpakkal vilaikoṇṭa viḷainilattukkum teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai Innilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai teruvukkum vaṭakkum Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟai vuṭpaṭa maṉai 100 Ikkuḻi nū kāḷikkoṉ maṉaiIrup peṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa maṉaikku melpāṟke yār tirunāmattukkāṇi maṉaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai koḷkiṉṟār Eṉ
pakkal vilaikoṇṭa viḷainilattukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai mutaliyār tirunāmattuk kāṇiviḷainilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kuḷattukku vaṭakkum Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟai vuṭpaṭa maṉai 100 Ikkuḻi nūṟum Ēṭetiriṭṭāṉmaṉai yeṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa maṉaikku melpāṟkellai nāyiṉār tirumeññāṉamuṭaiyār kuṭiniṅkā tevatāṉam viḷainilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai koḷkiṉṟār Eṉpak[kal vilaikoṇṭa viḷainilattukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai mutaliyār tirunāmattukkāṇi maṉaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kuḷattukku vaṭakkum Iṉṉāṉke .

app.note: The space for this expression is left unengraved on the stone.
The space for this expression is left unengraved on the stone.
The space for this expression is left unengraved on the stone.
The space for this expression is left blank on the stone.

The space for this expression is left blank on the stone.
The space for this expression is left blank on the stone.
The space for this expression is left blank on the stone.
The space for this expression is left blank on the stone.

div.p: Digital edition of SII 8.244 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
